This was a week of strategic pivots and operational momentum — the USCIS Expedite Request project was paused by leadership, Detention Prevention kicked off its Wave 2 client outreach, and the CoE backlog prioritization continued to drive how the team allocates effort. Several key scoping calls and cross-functional syncs kept the project machine moving, even with Jhara out all week.
